system.description:
Finds concealed traps, secret doors, obscured objects, buried treasure, and other hidden features (Judge rolls in secret). Hastily: 1 round, 5' reach (10' with a pole); a failed hasty search cannot be repeated until the next level; automatic while moving at exploration speed when passing within reach of a hidden feature. Methodically: 1 turn, +4 bonus, repeatable. Automated: matched by the Search party rolls.

Auto-scales with the owner's class level in party rolls (RR p. 31): L1: 18+ · L2: 17+ · L3: 16+ · L4: 15+ · L5: 14+ · L6: 13+ · L7: 11+ · L8: 9+ · L9: 7+ · L10: 5+ · L11: 3+ · L12: 1+ · L13: -1+ · L14: -3+. For a class using the skill at half level, set the module's levelFactor flag to 0.5.
